caption: A man with long dark hair tied back and wearing glasses performs in front of a brown slatted wall. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a dark vest with blue floral embroidery, and a decorative red and white necklace. He stands behind a microphone on a stand and plays an acoustic guitar. A small portion of another person's head is visible in the foreground. The on-screen text "ORCA" is displayed in a white speech bubble to the right of the performer. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, slightly shifting his head and posture while continuing to play his guitar, with his hands moving across the strings. The lighting and background remain constant throughout the scenes.
